extract: Eelektross (Japanese: シビルドン Shibirudon) is an Electric-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Eelektrik when exposed to a Thunder Stone. It is the final form of Tynamo. Eelektross can Mega Evolve into Mega Eelektross using the Eelektrossite. Mega Eelektross was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
